title: Customer Data ETL Pipeline
summary: Scalable data pipeline processing 10TB+ daily for telecom industry
description: Developed a robust ETL pipeline using Apache Spark and Airflow to process daily customer usage logs. Performed extensive data validation, deduplication, and aggregation. Created clean, denormalized data models for business stakeholders to monitor usage metrics and identify key trends. Pipeline achieved 99.9% uptime and reduced data processing latency by 45%.

title: Retail Sales Data Warehouse
summary: Cloud-based data warehouse implementation for retail sales using Snowflake
description: Built a comprehensive data warehouse system using dbt and Snowflake to consolidate sales across multiple regions. Ingested 5+ years of historical data, modeled into star schemas, and incorporated external datasets. Implemented automated data quality tests and CI/CD for dbt models. The warehouse enabled faster querying and reduced reporting time from days to minutes.

title: Real-time Streaming Pipeline
summary: Kafka-based event streaming architecture for social media monitoring
description: Developed a real-time data streaming pipeline using Apache Kafka and Flink to ingest continuous streams of social media mentions. Designed the architecture to handle bursts of data up to 10K events per second. Parsed JSON payloads, validated schema, and sunk data to MongoDB for immediate dashboarding access.

title: Healthcare Data Lake
summary: Secure and compliant datalake architecture for healthcare records
description: Designed a secure data lake using AWS S3 and AWS Glue for healthcare providers to store and query anonymized patient records. Engineered an orchestration process that handles PII obfuscation and implements strict IAM roles to ensure HIPAA compliance. Exposed query catalog via Amazon Athena for analysts to query securely.

title: On-prem to GCP Data Warehouse Migration
summary: End-to-end migration of legacy SQL Server data to Google BigQuery
description: Architected the migration strategy and execution of a complex multi-database on-premise SQL Server to Google Cloud BigQuery. Devised incremental data extraction pipelines with Dataproc. Handled schema conversion and resolved data type incompatibilities to ensure smooth migration. Setup fully automated Airflow DAGs for ongoing replication syncing.

title: Automated Data Quality Framework
summary: Custom Python application evaluating dataset health dynamically
description: Developed a full-featured data quality validation system with Great Expectations and custom Python scripts. It scans raw input tables for structural completeness, boundary anomalies, and freshness logic daily. Emits notifications to Slack automatically when quality thresholds are breached, avoiding bad metrics making their way into executive BI reports.
